cloudDescription: Browse shared AlphaTex scores from Tabst DB and jump out to the live public catalog when you want to explore more.
cloudAvailabilityNote: This desktop preview only supports public score browsing. There is no sign-in, private library, or publishing flow here.
cloudUnavailable: Public cloud browsing is not available in this build yet.
cloudDetailMissing: This public score is no longer available.
cloudSelectDescription: Choose a score from the left sidebar to preview it here, just like browsing files in a local workspace.
cloudPublicDescription: Open the public db.tabst.app catalog to discover shared AlphaTex scores from the community.
cloudPrivateSoonShort: Not available in this public-only build.
cloudPrivateSoonDescription: Private score browsing is intentionally disabled in the desktop app right now.
cloudUploadSoonDescription: Uploading, editing, and account-based management are intentionally out of scope for this desktop pass.
cloudSidebarHint: This Cloud mode is intentionally read-only: browse public scores on the left, preview the selected score on the right.
gitSelectFileHint: Select a changed file to view diff
gitBinaryNotice: Binary file changed. Text diff is unavailable.
gitRepoPathHelp: Copy this path and run git commands in your terminal.
